commands.review_summary:
Adds and revises inline comments and JSDoc across markdown-core, gateway-client, channel/message helpers, plugin SDK helpers, shared utilities, logging, infra, trajectory, and support code without an intended runtime behavior change.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a source-comment documentation sweep rather than a reported runtime bug. The relevant check is diff/source review plus proof that the after-patch verification was actually run.
